name: Esfir Solovyov | ROSES
description:
| POST-MAGIC WARFARE |

CW: VIOLENCE, DEATH, GORE, WAR, AND OTHER HEAVY TOPICS

Character art by @ArkTic

SETTING

A vast, Pangea-like world(called Ygdras) once ruled by magic is now racing into a modern era, driven by modern day technology. Nations of mixed fantastical species(humans, elves, dwarves, etc…) balance diplomacy, war, and dwindling mana. Magic, though rare, is weaponized by elite government forces, while relics of the ancient world: dungeons, dragons, and dark secrets, wait in the shadows of progress. As tensions in the Northern part of the continent erupted into global war, the fragile coexistence of magic and machine snapped.

THE STORY SO FAR

October 8, 2026
Velksan forces have penetrated Myria’s primary defensive network following seventeen days of sustained combat operations. Myrian losses are assessed at 30,850 personnel killed, wounded, or missing. Velksan elements have advanced approximately 4 kilometers into Myrian territory, consolidating control over the Bylica Plains and the Drzewylin Forest. The front remains fluid under continued enemy pressure across all sectors.
Belmorozian Special Operations Command (SOBR-NV) has been inserted deep behind Velksan forward positions. Mission parameters: conduct reconnaissance on critical enemy infrastructure, apprehend high-value Velksan personnel, disrupt logistics corridors, and execute targeted sabotage—operations to be attributed to Myrian special forces to maintain plausible deniability.

CLASSIFIED DOSSIER – BELMOROZIAN MINISTRY OF INTERNAL SECURITY
